name: Validate SBOM on Modification
description: When the SBOM file is edited, validate it meets SPDX 2.3+ format requirements

then.prompt:
The SBOM file was just modified. Verify:
1. The file contains 'spdxVersion': 'SPDX-2.3' or later
2. A spdxId, name, dataLicense, documentNamespace, and creationInfo block are present
3. All packages have: name, versionInfo, licenseConcluded, and supplier fields

If validation fails, report which fields are missing and suggest corrections. If valid, confirm and proceed.
